title: Cannot find verilator_bin at verilator/bin and getting "sh: line 1: exec: verilator_bin: not found"
body:
I am trying to build verilator from the source and following the Quick Install guide given in section 4.1 of the verilator docs. After completing the installation process when I am trying to run the `verilator --version` or` verilator --cc [options] [source_files.v]... [opt_c_files.cpp/c/cc/a/o/so]`, I am getting the following error.

```
sh: line 1: exec: verilator_bin: not found
%Error: Command Failed ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec verilator_bin --version
```
Strangely I don't get any error when I run `verilator --help`, and it outputs the verilator manual to the terminal correctly.

I have also tried to unset the VERILATOR_ROOT variable but that doesn't seem to change anything. I think the main problem is not that `verilator_bin` cannot be located properly but that it doesn't even exist under `verilator/bin` directory.

Here are the list files and executables present under `verilator/bin` directory.

````
shobhit@localhost:~/verilator/bin> ls
redirect   verilator_ccache_report  verilator_difftree  verilator_includer
verilator  verilator_coverage       verilator_gantt     verilator_profcfunc
````

How to resolve this?
code_blocks:
sh: line 1: exec: verilator_bin: not found
%Error: Command Failed ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec verilator_bin --version
